environmental.name: Power Outage
environmental.description: A power surge knocks out the primary data centre UPS. Generators kick in but there's a 30-second gap. Some systems require manual restart.

environmental.name: Fire Alarm
environmental.description: The building fire alarm activates. Staff must evacuate, including the incident response team. The SOC is unattended for 20 minutes.

environmental.name: Key Person Unavailable
environmental.description: A critical team member (CISO/CTO) is unreachable — they are on a flight with no connectivity for the next 4 hours.

environmental.name: Simultaneous Incident
environmental.description: An unrelated P2 incident is reported — a core banking application has crashed due to a failed patch. Resources are split.

environmental.name: Vendor System Down
environmental.description: Your primary security vendor's cloud management console is experiencing a global outage. No access to EDR, SIEM, or email security dashboards.

environmental.name: Social Media Storm
environmental.description: A viral social media post from a disgruntled customer (unrelated to the current incident) is consuming the communications team's bandwidth.

plot_twists.name: The Insider Connection
plot_twists.description: Evidence suggests an internal employee may have facilitated the attack by disabling security controls two weeks ago.

plot_twists.name: Regulatory Surprise Visit
plot_twists.description: The FCA announces a routine supervisory visit scheduled for tomorrow. The timing is coincidental but creates additional pressure.

plot_twists.name: Second Wave
plot_twists.description: A second, distinct attack vector is detected. The initial incident may have been a diversion for a more targeted attack.

plot_twists.name: Client Defection
plot_twists.description: Your largest institutional client formally invokes the security breach clause in their service agreement, giving 30-day notice of withdrawal.

plot_twists.name: Law Enforcement Intervention
plot_twists.description: The National Crime Agency contacts the bank. They have been tracking the threat actor group and request the bank delay certain remediation actions to preserve evidence for an ongoing investigation.

plot_twists.name: Insurance Complication
plot_twists.description: The cyber insurance provider sends a reservation of rights letter, suggesting the bank may have been in breach of policy conditions due to delayed patching.

plot_twists.name: Board Intervention
plot_twists.description: A board member with no technical background overrides the CISO and instructs the team to pay the ransom / restore access immediately, creating a command conflict.

plot_twists.name: Whistleblower
plot_twists.description: An anonymous internal whistleblower contacts the compliance team alleging that previous security audit findings were suppressed by senior management.

plot_twists.name: International Dimension
plot_twists.description: Affected clients include politically exposed persons (PEPs) from three different jurisdictions, each with their own data protection notification requirements and diplomatic sensitivities.

npc_actions.name: Helpful Analyst
npc_actions.description: A junior SOC analyst who was working overtime discovers a crucial log entry that everyone else missed. It changes the direction of the investigation.

npc_actions.name: Panicking Executive
npc_actions.description: A C-suite executive sends an all-staff email about the incident before the communications team has approved messaging. The email contains inaccurate information.

npc_actions.name: Proactive Vendor
npc_actions.description: A security vendor proactively reaches out with threat intelligence specific to the attack. They offer free incident response support for the next 48 hours.

npc_actions.name: Uncooperative Third Party
npc_actions.description: A critical third-party provider refuses to share logs or cooperate with the investigation without a formal legal request, citing their own data protection obligations.

npc_actions.name: Media Contact
npc_actions.description: A trusted journalist offers to delay publication of the story by 24 hours in exchange for an exclusive interview once the incident is resolved.

npc_actions.name: Regulator Inquiry
npc_actions.description: The ICO opens a formal investigation based on a complaint from an affected data subject who learned of the breach through social media before receiving official notification.

1.description: A small inconvenience that slightly delays the response

2.description: An annoying distraction that diverts one team member

3.description: A significant complication requiring team discussion

4.description: A notable setback that changes the response approach

5.description: A serious complication that threatens the response

6.description: A crisis within a crisis requiring immediate attention

1.modifier: You have 30 minutes before this escalates

2.modifier: You have 1 hour before this becomes critical

3.modifier: You have 4 hours before external parties become involved

4.modifier: You have until end of business today to resolve this
